name: FIRST INDUSTRIAL REALTY TRUST INC
summary: First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. is a self-administered, fully integrated REIT that owns, manages, acquires, sells, develops, and redevelops industrial real estate. As of December 31, 2025, its in-service portfolio consisted of 414 industrial properties across 19 states, totaling approximately 69.9 million square feet of GLA. The company focuses on 15 key logistics markets in the United States and operates primarily through its Delaware limited partnership Operating Partnership.
